name: Hot Potato and Sausage Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Medium Green Pepper, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the potatoes (unpeeled) in boiling salted water until tender (25 to 35 minutes). Drain, and as soon as they are cool enough to handle, slip off the skins. Cut the potatoes into 1/2-inch thick, bite-sized pieces. Place them in a deep warm bowl.
2. In a large frying pan, heat the oil and cook the sausage slices, stirring frequently until lightly browned. Remove with a slotted spoon and add to the potatoes. Add any remaining fat from the pan to the onions and green pepper, stirring over medium heat for about 2 minutes. Mix in the garlic, vinegar, broth, salt, and pepper. Cook until the mixture boils, stirring to loosen the sausage drippings. Boil for an additional minute.
3. Pour the green pepper mixture over the potatoes and mix lightly. Sprinkle with parsley. Serve hot.
